title: Anouncing my bid for President of USA

enrichment.summary: Kyle announces his intention to run for president of the United States in approximately 25 years (around 2039-2040), laying out his reasoning and the qualities he believes make him a good future candidate. He outlines a model for what a 'future politician' should look like: transparent, non-anonymous, self-educated, a historian, a futurist, and someone who builds name recognition early via YouTube and personal websites.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Plans to run around 2039-2040, giving himself 25 years to prepare
Respects repeat candidates like Ralph Nader as the most serious and credible
Anonymity is dying and future politicians should embrace full transparency
Rejects the traditional ladder (city council → mayor) in favor of self-educated scholar going straight to high office
Would make all meetings and correspondence public, including a reality-show-style YouTube presidency
Against aligning with parties to get ahead; wants to represent an independent, individualist model
Current debates are shallow name-calling; politicians should engage with deeper, more substantive issues
A president should be a prophet who paints a positive vision of the future
Government websites should be packed with transparent financial and subsidy data
